narrative:
Scioto County has 42,499 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a clear Republican lean of 7.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.6% of registrants.
